svg.title: Welcome to My Empire — full-page Art Deco resume design

g.text: One software developer, one page — the empire is purely decorative.
A full-stack engineer who treats interfaces like architecture —
clean lines, load-bearing structure, ornament only where it
earns its keep. Ten years building products that scale from
prototype to production without losing their character.
Leading front-end architecture for a suite of internal tools;
mentoring engineers, shipping a shared design system.
Built and maintained customer-facing web applications
end to end, from API to pixel.
Cut teeth on production code, learned the value of a
Always happy to talk shop, collaborate, or just say hello.
© 2026 · BUILT IN THE ART DECO STYLE
